//: Project-scoped hooks — code-formatter only. Global safety hooks and session-checkpoint-nudger are delivered to ~/.claude by T2 global-sync and wired globally. Commands are cwd-relative (node ".claude/hooks/…", NOT $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR — unset inside a WSL hook); BOOTSTRAP step 2 applies the per-env wrap (WSL-first on Windows-desktop). See windows-claude.md § Hooks.
